title: CSS Units and Sizing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential absolute and relative units for building responsive web designs.

questions.question: Which of these is the most common ABSOLUTE unit in CSS?
Which unit is RELATIVE to the font size of the ROOT (the <html> element)?
Which unit is relative to 1% of the browser window's height?
The 'calc()' function in CSS allows you to ________ right in your rules.
options: Perform mathematical operations (like mixings different units)

questions.question: Which property is used to prevent an element from getting too WIDE on large screens?
